description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'Check translations are up to date' that runs on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository with submodules and depth 0, set up Qt 5.15.2, and then check out KDE/extra-cmake-modules and KDE/syntax-highlighting. Install extra-cmake-modules and ksyntax-highlighting, build the project, and finally check if translations are up to date by running updateTranslation.sh and verifying no git diff.
